channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2863] Failure on test suite sanity-scrub test_11: (5) Expect [ 101 , 150 ) objects skipped, got 0
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/32e54cac-7fb8-11e2-85a4-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_11 failed with the following error:

(5) Expect [ 101 , 150 ) objects skipped, got 0

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity-scrub test 10b: non-stopped OI scrub should auto restarts after MDS remount (2) == 17:32:58 (1361842378)
LDISKFS-fs (sdb1): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
LDISKFS-fs (sdb1): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Using TIMEOUT=20
Lustre: ctl-lustre-MDT0000: super-sequence allocation rc = 0 [0x0000000200000400-0x0000000240000400):0:mdt
Lustre: Skipped 3 previous similar messages
LDISKFS-fs (sdb1): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
LDISKFS-fs (sdb1): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
LDISKFS-fs (sdb1): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
LDISKFS-fs (sdb1): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
LDISKFS-fs (sdb1): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
LustreError: 7891:0:(qsd_reint.c:58:qsd_reint_completion()) lustre-MDT0000: failed to enqueue global quota lock, glb fid:[0x200000006:0x10000:0x0], rc:-5
LustreError: 7891:0:(qsd_reint.c:58:qsd_reint_completion()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
LDISKFS-fs (sdb1): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
Lustre: 8280:0:(mdt_lproc.c:380:lprocfs_wr_identity_upcall()) lustre-MDT0000: identity upcall set to /usr/sbin/l_getidentity
Lustre: 8280:0:(mdt_lproc.c:380:lprocfs_wr_identity_upcall()) Skipped 11 previous similar messages
LustreError: 11-0: lustre-MDT0000-lwp-MDT0000: Communicating with 0@lo, operation mds_connect failed with -11.
LustreError: Skipped 11 previous similar messages
LNet: 8382:0:(debug.c:324:libcfs_debug_str2mask()) You are trying to use a numerical value for the mask - this will be deprecated in a future release.
LNet: 8382:0:(debug.c:324:libcfs_debug_str2mask()) Skipped 23 previous similar messages
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity-scrub test 11: OI scrub skips the new created objects only once == 17:34:56 (1361842496)
LDISKFS-fs (sdb1): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Using TIMEOUT=20
LustreError: 0-0: lustre-MDT0000: trigger OI scrub by RPC for [0x61a9:0xa8c3b83f:0x0], rc = 0 [1]
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: sanity-scrub test_11: @@@@@@ FAIL: (5) Expect [ 101 , 150 ) objects skipped, got 0
item.environment: Running this test with a route between servers and clients and set the module parameter rnet_htable_size=1070
item.summary: Failure on test suite sanity-scrub test_11: (5) Expect [ 101 , 150 ) objects skipped, got 0

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
This is the patch:

http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,5551
We need to reformat the device before sanity-scrub test_11 run to guarantee the system is consistent when the test start.
